creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
There are some regressions, with some output now on several lines

http://package22.nyi.freebsd.org/data/103amd64-default-PR218274/2017-04-01_10h38m01s/logs/errors/gtkmm30-3.16.0.log
http://package22.nyi.freebsd.org/data/103amd64-default-PR218274/2017-04-01_10h38m01s/logs/errors/gtkmm24-2.24.4_3.log

Before:
1 checking for GMMPROC_EXTRA_M4_DIR... /usr/local/lib/pangomm-1.4/proc/m4 /usr/local/lib/atkmm-1.6/proc/m4


After:
1 checking for GMMPROC_EXTRA_M4_DIR... /usr/local/lib/pangomm-1.4/proc/m4
2 /usr/local/lib/atkmm-1.6/proc/m4
